name: SA.I.dekick
desc: Target face-up cards your opponent controls equal to the number of Cyberse monsters you control with 2300 original ATK; negate their effects until the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Cyberse monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "SA.I.dekick" once per turn.
eff: Target face-up cards your opponent controls equal to the number of Cyberse monsters you control with 2300 original ATK; negate their effects until the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 of your banished Cyberse monsters; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "SA.I.dekick" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
